title: Kimogila

{{Quote|They're one of the most venomous creatures in the galaxy and can swallow a Wookiee whole if the mood strikes them.|[[Finn Darktrin]]|<ref name="TRoD">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine]]''</ref>}}
The '''Kimogila''' was a huge [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] creature, quite similar to the [[Krayt dragon/Legends|krayt dragon]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], that was native to the planet [[Lok/Legends|Lok]].

==Biology and appearance==
{{Quote|It's because of the sulfur that the kimogilla developed such a tough hide. I've only seen one sample of it. Amazing, adaptive feature on the beast.|[[Dusque Mistflier]]|<ref name="TRoD" />}}
[[File:Kimogila.png|thumb|left|200px|A kimogila]]
Kimogilas were generally about the same size as [[Krayt dragon/Legends|krayt dragons]].<ref name="SWG" /> Because of the sulfur pools and rivers present on Lok, the creature had evolved to boast a layer of extremely resilient scales, capable of withstanding all but the strongest anti-personnel weapons. They were also known to have one of the most toxic venom in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], which could immobilize its prey in seconds.<ref name="SWG:K" />

==History==
{{Quote|If we're lucky, we won't see a single one of those monsters while we're here.|Finn Darktrin|<ref name="TRoD" />}}
The kimogilas were notoriously difficult to kill,<ref name="SWG:K" /> its ferocious nature led [[Big game hunter/Legends|big-game hunters]] to try to kill one for sport.<ref name="TCSWE" /> Their scales were known to be very useful in the construction of [[Armor/Legends|armor]], especially [[Reinforced Insulated Sheath armor]].<ref name="SWG:P4">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=other|Publish 4: "Mounts and Cities"}}</ref>

The [[Great Kimogila's Skeleton|skeleton of a particularly massive kimogila]] was known as one of the most notable point of interests of the planet Lok during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG:GKS">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=poi|Great Kimogila's Skeleton|Lok}}</ref> There was also a story that a group of settlers were tricked into buying land not far from the [[Nym's Stronghold|stronghold]] of [[Nym/Legends|Nym]], that was infested with Kimogilas. Soon after they settled the land, the Kimogilas destroyed the entire town, earning it the name of [[Kimogila Town]] to those who knew of it. Offworlders were sometimes lured by thieves posing as tourist guides, offering the location of a supposedly beautiful hidden oasis for credits, only to be left to their fate as prey to packs of the large creatures.<ref name="SWG:KT" />

After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]], [[Hunting/Legends|hunters]] and [[Scout/Legends|explorers]] discovered that aged kimogilas had begun to change their migratory patterns on Lok due to shortening of food supplies. Meanwhile, the existence of dwarf kimogilas was reported on the planet. The origin of these smaller kimogilas was unknown but some pretended that they were the result of [[Bioengineering/Legends|bioengineer]] experiments, what had been denied by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="Sony">{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Star%20Wars%20Galaxies:%20Bestiary%20-%20Lok|text=Star Wars Galaxies: Bestiary – Lok}}</ref>

Around the same time, an organization dedicated to the protection of the endangered species named [[Rescue Our Lesser Brothers]] claimed it was responsible for helping a group of people on Lok to raise Kimogilas.<ref name="SWG:ac">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=herald|a commoner|Endor}}</ref>

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a spacer fought and killed three enraged kimogilas on Lok as part of his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|trials]] to become a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]].<ref name="SWG:SotF">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=other|Publish 9: "Secrets of the Force"}}</ref>

The [[M12-L Kimogila heavy fighter]] was named after the creature, as well as the [[Kimogila Fanatics]].<ref name="SWG:JtL">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Kimogila_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|220px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
Kimogilas appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
